desc: Virginia Department of Health public use dataset containing annual case counts and incidence rates for reportable diseases.

columns.name: Year
columns.desc: The specific year the disease surveillance data was recorded.

columns.name: Condition
columns.desc: The name of the reportable disease.

columns.name: Geography Level
columns.desc: The scale of the geographic boundary used for reporting, typically classified as State, Health Planning Region, or Locality.

columns.name: Geography Value
columns.desc: The specific text name of the reporting area corresponding to the geography level (e.g., Virginia, Eastern Region, Fairfax County).

columns.name: FIPS
columns.desc: The standard Federal Information Processing Series numeric code uniquely identifying the specific Virginia county, independent city, or state boundary.

columns.name: Annual Case Count
columns.desc: The total integer count of confirmed or probable cases of the condition reported within that geography during the calendar year.

columns.name: Incidence Rate
columns.desc: The calculated rate of disease occurrence expressed as the number of reported cases per 100,000 population within the specified geography.
